author: amaltaro
body:
Fixes https://github.com/dmwm/WMCore/issues/10489

A copy of the `couchdb15.spec`, with the following differences:
* a new name :-D
* it brings in the python3 CMSCouchapp library (instead of its python2 version)
title: Created new spec for CouchDB 1.6 with python3 CMSCouchapp
